title: Round Natural Wood Slice x 22 cm - Wedding Table Flower Display
features: Thick natural wood slice - Measures approx 20 x 3cm
Attractive rustic display stand and decoration
Ideal for wedding decoration, event and home decor
Please note this is a natural product and the shape and size may vary
Due to the type of wood used there may be a small hole in the centre of the slice - this is a natural feature of Paulownia wood
